svg.title: whiteness-downloads-by-week-cumulative-normalized-start
svg.desc: Line graph of media objects as peer swarms over time, from week 1 to week 26. The y-xis is the number of downloaders in millions. The x-axis is the week number of the sample, starting at 1 and ending at or before 26.

g.text: Whiteness Downloads by Week Cumulative (Normalized Start)
